summary: Project with a form submission feature; form is currently broken (submit error) and needs a fix.
known_issues: Form submission returns an error when users try to submit — needs immediate fix.

existing_features.title: Investigate and fix the contact form submission error in ContactSection.tsx and the useSubmitContactForm hook (useQueries.ts). Ensure the form submits successfully to the backend, handles the response correctly, and displays a success message on completion instead of an error alert.
